special_mechanics.name: Player switching
special_mechanics.description: Player can switch control between any of the eleven footballers on their team at any time during play

special_mechanics.name: Ball physics
special_mechanics.description: Ball movement and interaction with players and goalkeeper

tier_notes: Tier 2 data: Sports game with empirical/qualitative documentation only. Wikipedia source mentions 'speed the game ran at and issues with the response to the player's input were seen as the game's primary faults' but no quantitative movement parameters are documented. This is a football/soccer simulation rather than a platformer, so traditional jump/gravity mechanics do not apply. Player movement is football-based (walking, running with ball, kicking) rather than physics-based platforming.
